name: rtp-personal-skills
description: Ravi Teja Palanki's second brain — installable. A top-0.1% AI PM by depth, a smart human across every domain by breadth. 80 skills (1 orchestrator v1.4.0 + 62 AI PM skills across 7 specialist layers + 17 general-purpose) and 11 slash commands. AI PM is where the expertise runs deepest; the same thinking discipline applies to any question (code review, finance, history, design, life decisions) — research first, push back when wrong, end with what to do Monday morning. Designed to install on any Claude Code account and command the wider plugin ecosystem (superpowers, compound-engineering, pm-skills, anthropic-skills) — see COMPANION-PLUGINS.md for the 5-tier map.

plugins.name: rtp-personal-skills
plugins.description: The complete RTP skill library: rtp-aipm-orchestrator (v1.4.0, Ravi's second brain — always on, scope determined by the question, not by an AI-PM ceiling) + 62 AI PM skills across 7 specialist layers (thinking-core, product-sense, ai-strategy, safety-and-trust, agent-design, eval-and-quality, craft) + 17 general-purpose skills (thinking, writing, branding, presentations, visualization, design-systems, research, admin, resume-builder, readme-storytelling) + 11 slash commands including /rtp-setup for ecosystem bootstrap. Pairs with companion plugins documented in COMPANION-PLUGINS.md.
